rubrics.name: Business Writing Standards
rubrics.description: Evaluate whether the answer demonstrates business professionalism, correctness of information, and relevance to the scenario.

rubrics.name: Clarity & Conciseness
rubrics.description: Evaluate readability, smooth flow of ideas, sentence quality, and conciseness.

rubrics.name: Cultural Adaptation
rubrics.description: Evaluate whether the writing tone and context are adapted for the intended audience (US client James Carter and UK technical lead Emily Watson).

rubrics.name: Presentation & Formatting
rubrics.description: Evaluate document structure, sectioning (introduction–body–conclusion), bullet points/tables, and visual organization.
